About Me

Hello, I'm Kerry

Wedding photographer & content creator based in Glasgow, Scotland

Hello

Nice to meet you

A little about
what I do

I'm a wedding photographer and content creator based in Glasgow, Scotland. With a passion for capturing love stories and unforgettable moments, I strive to create images that are both beautiful and authentic.

My work combines a keen eye for detail with a deep appreciation for natural light and vibrant storytelling. Whether it's a grand celebration or an intimate gathering, I aim to document the moments that truly matter.

"I strive to create images that feel beautiful, authentic, and true to your story."

Let’s connect

Thank you for taking the time to learn a bit about me. If you're interested in collaborating or would like to see more of my portfolio, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Let's Work Together
ʜᴀᴘᴘɪʟʏ ᴇᴠᴇʀ ᴄᴀᴘᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ

Kerry Percy · Wedding content creator based in Glasgow, Scotland.
